The reachability gate is preserved, so URL fabrication still zeroes the score."]}]]}],["$","nav",null,{"className":"mb-5 flex items-center gap-1 overflow-x-auto border-b","aria-label":"Section tracking-tight","children":"Why v4?"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-2 max-w-3xl text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/80","children":"v2 was overweighted on URL grounding (60% of quality). v4 answers the critique by adding four independent signals:"}],["$","ul",null,{"className":"mt-3 max-w-3xl list-disc pl-5 text-[13.5px] text-foreground/80 space-y-1.5","children":[["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Factual exactness"}]," — atomic-fact extraction + NLI against the cited page."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Internal consistency"}]," — entity clustering + pairwise NLI on the report itself."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Perspective balance"}]," — sentiment lexicon + LLM judge on viewpoint coverage."]}],["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Source diversity"}]," — deterministic (no LLM) measure of how spread across the three sources."]}]]}]]}],["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-8 rounded-lg border bg-card p-6","children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-[18px] font-semibold tracking-tight","children":"Formula"}],["$","pre",null,{"className":"mt-3 overflow-x-auto rounded bg-primary p-3 text-[12px] text-primary-foreground","children":"composite_v4 = reach · (\n    0.10·url_cov + 0.05·spec + 0.10·checklist\n  + 0.10·cit_align + 0.05·qm\n  + 0.13·factual_exactness + 0.13·internal_consistency\n  + 0.08·perspective_balance + 0.06·source_diversity\n  + 0.10·analysis_depth + 0.10·presentation\n)"}]]}],["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-12 rounded-lg border bg-card p-6","children":[["$","h2",null,{"className":"text-[18px] font-semibold tracking-tight","children":"Status"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-2 max-w-3xl text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/80","children":["v4 runs on a small sample (25 runs / 46 battles) and is in pilot mode. The leaderboard JSON is published at"," ",["$","code",null,{"className":"num-mono","children":"/api/v4.json"}]," once the build completes. The headline ranking still uses v2 in production because the truth-gate inversion finding is the primary methodological contribution and is cleanest at the v2 scale."]}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-3 max-w-3xl text-[14px] leading-relaxed text-foreground/80","children":["Until the v4 bulk run finishes, the interactive v4 leaderboard view is offline.
